title: onobrychis alatavica
intro: Onobrychis alatavica, also known as the Alatau spiny pea or Alatau milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis alatavica include its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis alatavica include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
